boundary: Source custody preflight only: this pack does not satisfy goal completion, does not claim expert approval, does not claim a timed rehearsal was completed, and provides no award guarantee.

source_custody_categories.source_role: real reviewer signed form, email reply, meeting minutes, or chat screenshot
source_restrictions: the source must be the original evidence attachment received from the reviewer, observer, timer, or meeting record
the source attachment must be non-empty before preflight and before record
the source attachment must not be a JSON metadata file
--source must not point inside docs/challenge_cup/reproducibility/hard_evidence/**; that tree is for archived intake outputs
duplicate source_sha256 values within a hard evidence category must be rejected by the ledger
--force is allowed only for a deliberate correction and must include a non-empty --force-reason
every --force overwrite must append docs/challenge_cup/reproducibility/hard_evidence/override_log.jsonl with previous and new source_sha256 values

custody_checkpoints.evidence_state: external source exists outside archived hard_evidence intake
custody_checkpoints.required_proof: original evidence attachment is present, non-empty, and traceable to a real human source
custody_checkpoints.command: manual source receipt check before running preflight
custody_checkpoints.acceptance_signal: source file path, source owner, source date, and source type are known

custody_checkpoints.evidence_state: source hash calculated without writing intake files
custody_checkpoints.required_proof: preflight output contains source_sha256 and does not create archived metadata
custody_checkpoints.command: python scripts/preflight_challenge_cup_hard_evidence.py expert_feedback --id real-feedback-id --source path/to/original-real-feedback.eml --evidence-type email_reply --reviewer-identity real-reviewer-identity --role-or-org real-reviewer-role-or-org --review-date YYYY-MM-DD --review-dimension practicality --review-dimension innovation --review-dimension boundary_rigor --remediation-issue issue --remediation-action action --confirm-real-feedback
custody_checkpoints.acceptance_signal: preflight status=pass and source_sha256 is recorded for the original source attachment

custody_checkpoints.evidence_state: source copied into the hard_evidence intake tree by the record command
custody_checkpoints.required_proof: metadata source_path and source_sha256 match the archived source copy
custody_checkpoints.command: python scripts/record_challenge_cup_hard_evidence.py expert_feedback --id real-feedback-id --source path/to/original-real-feedback.eml --evidence-type email_reply --reviewer-identity real-reviewer-identity --role-or-org real-reviewer-role-or-org --review-date YYYY-MM-DD --review-dimension practicality --review-dimension innovation --review-dimension boundary_rigor --remediation-issue issue --remediation-action action --confirm-real-feedback
custody_checkpoints.acceptance_signal: hard_evidence metadata for expert_feedback records source_origin=external_attachment and matching source_sha256

custody_checkpoints.evidence_state: hard evidence ledger rebuilt from archived intake files
custody_checkpoints.required_proof: ledger category reflects accepted or rejected metadata without manual edits

custody_checkpoints.evidence_state: package manifests and archive regenerated after source archival
custody_checkpoints.required_proof: package manifest, evidence hashes, command log, and archive include the new source and metadata

custody_checkpoints.evidence_state: submission archive verified after package rebuild
custody_checkpoints.required_proof: verifier checks the refreshed archive, manifest, and hash inventory
custody_checkpoints.acceptance_signal: submission package verifier reports Status: pass

custody_checkpoints.evidence_state: readiness gate rerun after package rebuild
custody_checkpoints.required_proof: readiness report reflects the current package state after hard evidence changes
custody_checkpoints.acceptance_signal: readiness gate reports Status: pass for the current gate count

custody_checkpoints.evidence_state: goal completion decision made only by the goal gate
custody_checkpoints.required_proof: goal completion gate reads current readiness report and hard evidence ledger
custody_checkpoints.acceptance_signal: goal_completion_report.md explicitly states whether completion_claim_allowed is True or False

operator_commands: python scripts/preflight_challenge_cup_hard_evidence.py expert_feedback --id real-feedback-id --source path/to/original-real-feedback.eml --evidence-type email_reply --reviewer-identity real-reviewer-identity --role-or-org real-reviewer-role-or-org --review-date YYYY-MM-DD --review-dimension practicality --review-dimension innovation --review-dimension boundary_rigor --remediation-issue issue --remediation-action action --confirm-real-feedback

python scripts/record_challenge_cup_hard_evidence.py expert_feedback --id real-feedback-id --source path/to/original-real-feedback.eml --evidence-type email_reply --reviewer-identity real-reviewer-identity --role-or-org real-reviewer-role-or-org --review-date YYYY-MM-DD --review-dimension practicality --review-dimension innovation --review-dimension boundary_rigor --remediation-issue issue --remediation-action action --confirm-real-feedback

custody_checkpoints.acceptance_signal: preflight status=pass and source_sha256 is recorded for the original source attachment

integrity_guardrails: do not fabricate evidence or create placeholder hard evidence attachments
do not claim expert approval before source archival and hard_evidence_ledger rebuild
do not claim a timed rehearsal before source archival and hard_evidence_ledger rebuild
no award guarantee is created by this source custody pack, readiness gate, or verifier
source_sha256 must be calculated from the original source attachment before and after archival
override_log.jsonl is mandatory for intentional replacement of archived metadata or source copies
